message.content:
@startuml
title PB-749 UC4 - Update a Banner on System Management

actor "System Management" as SM
participant "Core Next" as CN
database "Next Database" as DB
participant "Core Bradesco" as CB

rectangle "Next Platform" {
  CN
  DB
}

note right of SM
  System Management will call this new endpoint
  passing all the fields necessary to update an
  existing Banner. The fields are:
  1. BANNER_ID
  2. BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE_ID
  3. TEMPLATE_HEADER
  4. TEMPLATE_BODY
  5. ENABLE_IND
end note

SM -> CN: 1 PUT /v1/notification/banner/{bannerID}

note right of CN
  Core Next will check if this Banner exists on BANNER table
end note

CN -> DB: 2 check if this Banner exists on BANNER table
DB --> CN: 3 response

alt [if the Banner exists]
  CN -> DB: 4 check if exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE received on requisition on BANNER table

  note right of CN
    Note to developers
    Core Next will check if exists any Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE on BANNER table. We can only have one enabled Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE. For this rule, we should disregard the records that are with DELETE_FLG enabled and the Card itself.
  end note

  DB --> CN: 5 response

  alt [if exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE]
    note right of CN
      If exists any Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE passed by App,
      we will throw back an error to App side.
    end note
    CN --> SM: 6 error
    SM --> CN: HTTP code: 422
  else [if don't exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE]
    note right of CN
      If the defensive checks pass, then we will update the register on BANNER table.
    end note
    CN -> DB: 7 update the register on BANNER table
    DB --> CN: 8 success
    CN --> SM: 9 success
    SM --> CN: HTTP code: 200
  end
else [if the Banner don't exists]
  note right of CN
    If the Banner don't exists on BANNER table, then we will throw back an error to SM.
    HTTP code: 404
  end note
  CN --> SM: 10 error
end

@enduml
